title: camassia biflora
intro: Camassia biflora, also known as the yellow camas or two-flowered camas, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Camassia biflora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
